title: Learning Online: A New Way to Study
passage:
Learning Online

Online learning is a way to study using the internet. Many people learn at home with their computers or tablets. Online courses are very popular. Students can learn at their own pace. They can watch videos, read texts, and do exercises.

Many schools and universities offer online classes. Students can join live classes or watch recorded lessons later. This is good for people who work or have other duties. They can learn when they have time.

Online learning helps people from different places. Students can meet others from around the world. They can share ideas and learn together. It is a fun way to study.

However, online learning also has challenges. Some students miss the classroom. They want to meet teachers and friends in person. It can be hard to stay focused when learning at home. But many people enjoy the flexibility of online education.

questions.explanation: Students use computers for online learning as mentioned in the passage.

questions.explanation: The passage states there are challenges with online learning.
